title: elephantopus carolinianus var. mollis
intro: Elephantopus carolinianus var. mollis, also known as soft elephantopus, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the Philippines. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elephantopus carolinianus var. mollis include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
